title: Data Analyst
tagsAndSkills: Power Bi,Data Analysis,SQL,Bi,ETL tools,Bi Tools,Data Visualization,Tableau
jobDescription:
We are Hiring Data Analyst at Coforge Ltd.


Role Overview:-


We are seeking an experienced Data Analyst who can work closely with business stakeholders, understand requirements, and translate them into data-driven insights.


The ideal candidate should be strong in analytics, SQL, visualization tools, and must have hands-on experience with large data sets and complex reporting.


Note: This is a high-priority project, and we are ideally looking for someone who is available to join immediately.


Job Locations:- Greater Noida Only.

Experience Required:- 5 to 10 Years


Share your CV: Gaurav.2.Kumar@coforge.com


WhatsApp for Queries: 9667427662



Key Responsibilities:-


1. Data Analysis & Insights


  • Analyze large and complex datasets to identify trends, patterns, and actionable insights.
  • Perform exploratory data analysis (EDA) to support business decisions.
  • Work with structured and semi-structured data.

2. Data Modeling & Data Preparation


  • Design and develop logical/physical data models for reporting and analytics.
  • Clean, transform, and process data using SQL, Python, or ETL tools.
  • Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and integrity.

3. Reporting & Visualization


  • Build dashboards,reports, and visual insights using:
    • Power BI / Tableau / Qlik
  • Optimize dashboards for usability and performance.
  • Present analytical findings to business leaders in a clear, impactful manner.

4. Stakeholder Collaboration


  • Work closely with business teams, product owners, and technical teams.
  • Capture analytics requirements and convert them into technical specifications.
  • Support business reviews and strategic planning with data insights.

5. Advanced Analytics (Preferred)


  • Perform statistical analysis and forecasting.
  • Experience with predictive modeling or machine learning is a plus.


Required Technical Skills


1. SQL & Databases


  • Strong SQL expertise (joins, windows functions, optimization).
  • Experience with RDBMS like MySQL, SQL Server, Oracle, PostgreSQL, Snowflake, BigQuery, etc.

2. Programming


  • Strong working knowledge of Python for data manipulation (Pandas, NumPy).
  • Ability to write reusable, modular scripts.

3. BI & Data Visualization


  • Hands-on experience with at least one BI tool:
    • Power BI (Preferred)
    • Tableau
    • Qlik
  • Strong understanding of dashboards, KPIs, and storytelling with data.

4. Data Engineering Concepts


  • Experience with ETL/ELT workflows.
  • Understanding of data warehouses & data lakes.
  • Ability to work with big data platforms is an advantage.

Additional Skills


  • Strong communication and presentation skills.
  • Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.
  • Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking.
  • Experience working in Agile environments.

Qualifications


  • Bachelors/Masters degree in Computer Science, IT, Statistics, Engineering, Mathematics, or related field.
  • 5 to 10 years of total professional experience in data analysis or analytics-based roles.

title: Data Analyst
tagsAndSkills: IT Operations,Slack,M365,M365 infrastructure,Data Analysis,Okta,Analysis,Data
jobDescription:
Overview:

TekWissen Group is a workforce management provider throughout India and many other countries in the world.


Title: Data Analyst

Work Location: Remote

Duration: 12 Months

Job Type: Temporary Assignment

Work Type: Remote


Job Description:

  • We are seeking a highly motivated Senior Microsoft Engineer who will be responsible for the architectural design, implementation, and highest level of support for our global enterprise M365 environment.
  • This is a fantastic opportunity to bring your deep experience and creativity to a leadership role within our team.
  • The successful candidate will be a dedicated team player, able to drive the business forward while mentoring others in a remote, 24x7 operational environment.

Your Impact:

  • Provide end-to-end ownership and serve as the subject matter expert for our global M365 infrastructure.
  • Lead the architectural design, setup, and configuration of M365 systems for new office sites from the ground up.
  • Provide comprehensive support for our global M365 infrastructure, including monitoring, alert management, and maintenance (patching, upgrades, and tuning).
  • Drive strategy for M365 maintenance, including major upgrades, patching, and performance tuning to ensure maximum stability and performance optimization.
  • Provide expert-level support for our core M365 technologies from both proactive and reactive positions.
  • For: Azure, Sharepoint, Exchange online, and Intune.
  • Additional experience providing admin support for: Slack, Okta.
  • Monitoring services and alerts for: M365 gear and perform initial triage for network issues.
  • Act as the final escalation point for critical M365 issues, providing guidance and mentorship to junior team members.
  • Managing ticket queues, tickets and escalations Act as an escalation point for complex troubleshooting, collaborating with the team and office stakeholders to ensure timely remediation.Develop and maintain documentation for implementation guidelines, runbooks, reusable design templates, and support templates.
  • Work with a drive for success to ensure the stability and reliability of our network.

Your Experience:

  • 7+ years of extensive experience managing and designing corporate IT M365 systems in a modern, global environment.
  • Deep expertise in M365 infrastructure and monitoring principles.
  • A dedicated and hardworking individual with a strong drive for success and proven experience in continuous improvement to drive the business forward.
  • Significant experience leading the deployment of M365 infrastructure for new sites Maintaining ticket queues, tickets and escalations Working with IT operations management (ITOM) software that monitors and alerts on an organization's IT infrastructure, from network devices to servers and applications Deep expertise and strong hands-on experience with Azure, Sharepoint, Exchange online, and Intune.
  • Additional experience providing admin support for: Slack, Okta.
  • An excellent team player with superior communication skills, able to collaborate effectively with teams and stakeholders in a globally disbursed environment.
  • A track record of providing guidance and mentorship to develop junior team members.
  • Flexibility to provide leadership and coverage in a 24x7 shift operation.
  • Which may include an on-call rotation.
  • Must have reliable internet for this remote position.
  • BA or BS Degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering or equivalent experience.

Nice to Haves:

  • Advanced Technical Certifications (e.g., Microsoft 365 Certified: Enterprise Administrator Expert, Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert).
  • Can provide examples of projects or initiatives youve helped deliver to business stakeholders.
  • Experience in leveraging AI technologies to assist in your role.
  • You prefer to solve problems with code over clicks.
  • Strong orientation to be results and data-driven.

TekWissen Group is an equal opportunity employer supporting workforce diversity.

title: Data Analyst
tagsAndSkills: Power Bi,Tableau,Data Analytics,SQL,Analytics,Data,Data analysis,Bi
jobDescription:
The Data Analyst will serve as the insights engine for our Outplacement and Career Transition business, responsible for managing all data touchpoints across the employee transition lifecycle. This includes overseeing touchpoint surveys, NPS and satisfaction metrics, landing (reemployment) data, impact reporting, and global data consolidation. This role will work closely with global teams to incorporate best practices, harmonize data standards, and elevate the analytics maturity of our transition programs. The ideal candidate brings strong analytical capability, excellent attention to detail, an understanding of customer experience measurement, and the ability to translate data into insights that support operational excellence and management decision-making


Key Accountabilities, Responsibilities


1.Touchpoint & Experience Analytics

  • Deploy and manage touchpoint surveys across the outplacement journey (start, mid-program, landing, program closure).
  • Analyze quantitative and qualitative feedback to identify themes, risks, and continuous improvement.
  • Build dashboards to monitor satisfaction trends, experience gaps, and participant engagement across programs (through milestone tracking).
  • Needs to partner with in-country coaches/experts/delivery leads to validate data accuracy and contextualizing insights.

2. Landing & Reemployment Data Management

  • Track and validate landing outcomes for participants (reemployment, promotions, transitions to new industries, timing, track salary changes).

3. NPS Governance & Best Practices

  • Track the NPS measurement process across all outplacement touchpoints.
  • Implement standard frameworks to measure client satisfaction, loyalty drivers and detractors.
  • Benchmark NPS trends against global standard

4. Global Collaboration & Data Standards

  • Work with regional and global offices to implement methodology, templates, survey architecture, landing definitions, and data taxonomies.
  • Drive consistency in reporting formats, definitions, KPIs, and analytics tools.

5. Reporting & Insight Generation

  • Develop and maintain dashboards in Power BI/Tableau/Excel to track program performance, reemployment trends, and NPS drivers.
  • Prepare monthly and quarterly insights for internal leadership and clients.
  • Ensure timely and accurate delivery of all data-driven reports to management.

6. Data Quality & Governance

  • Maintain hygiene of data in Medallion/ Share-point, outplacement platforms, and analytics systems.
  • Implement checks and controls to ensure data completeness, accuracy, and standardization.
  • •Implement automation opportunities to reduce manual effort



Required Experience & Skills


  • Graduate/Post-Graduate degree with statistics or data specialisation • 7-10 years of total experience with a minimum of 3 years in working with data systems- data cleaning, SQL queries, Data bases and Data lakes.

• Experience working in multi-country, matrixed organizations is a plus. • Must be proficient in Excel, Power BI, Tableau, or equivalent analytics tools.

  • Strong skills in data cleaning, validation, transformation, and visualization.
  • Experience with survey tools (Qualtrics, SurveyMonkey, or equivalent). • Familiarity with CRM systems (Salesforce, MS Dynamics, or similar) is an advantage.
  • Should be willing to work in the European shift timings
  • Excellent written & verbal communication skills


Nice to Haves

• 10+ working experience.

• Previous experience in working with HR tech tools

• Worked in a global environment role as a coordinator preferably EU & NA regions.

• Storytelling with datastructured, logical, management-friendly reporting

• Ability to interpret data and translate it into actionable business insights

title: Online Data Analyst - Bengali
tagsAndSkills: Data analysis,Bengali,data management,Online Data Analyst,online research,Analysis,Data,Management
jobDescription:
Are you a detail-oriented individual with a passion for research and a good understanding of national and local geography? This freelance opportunity allows you to work at your own pace and from the comfort of your own home.

A Day in the Life of an Online Data Analyst:

  • In this role, you will be working on a project aimed at enhancing the content and quality of digital maps that are used by millions of people worldwide
  • Completing research and evaluation tasks in a web-based environment such as verifying and comparing data, and determining the relevance and accuracy of information.

Join us today and be part of a dynamic and innovative team that is making a difference in the world!

QUALIFICATION PATH

No previous professional experience is required to apply to this role, however, working on this project will require you to pass the basic requirements and go through a standard assessment process. This is a part-time long-term project and your work will be subject to our standard quality assurance checks during the term of this agreement.

Basic Requirements

  • Full Professional Proficiency in Bengali & English language
  • Being a resident in India for the last 2 consecutive years and having familiarity with current and historical business, media, sport, news, social media, and cultural affairs in India.
  • Ability to follow guidelines and conduct online research using search engines, online maps, and website information
  • Flexibility to work across a diverse set of task types, including maps, news, audio tasks, and relevance
  • Daily access to a broadband internet connection, computer, and relevant software

ASSESSMENT

In order to be hired into the program, youll take an open book qualification exam that will determine your suitability for the position and complete ID verification. Our team will provide you with guidelines and learning materials before your qualification exam. You will be required to complete the exam in a specific timeframe but at your convenience.

ambitionBoxData.Title: RankUno Interactive Technologies Reviews by Employees

jobDescription:
Data Analyst Business Growth

Business Growth Department | Mid-Level | Full-Time

Position


Data Analyst / Data Scientist

Location


Pune

Experience


3–5 years in a data or analytics role


Role Summary

We are looking for a commercially minded Data Analyst to join our Business Growth team. You will be the go-to person for performance intelligence. Your work will directly shape strategic priorities across the business.


Key Responsibilities

  • Monitor and report on performance across geographies (region, country, city), customer segments, institutions, and marketing channels – proactively calling out what's up, what's down, and by how much.
  • Investigate performance drops and surface root-cause hypotheses: seasonality, market shifts, competitive pressure, budget changes, or product/pricing factors.
  • Build and maintain dashboards and recurring reports that give stakeholders a clear, real-time view of business health.
  • Analyse conversion and revenue trends across acquisition channels (paid, email, direct, referral), online, offline and flag shifts in channel mix efficiency.
  • Identify high-performing segments and underserved markets to guide growth investments.
  • Communicate findings as concise, decision-ready narratives - not just data - to senior stakeholders.

What We're Looking For

  • 3–5 years of experience in a data analyst or business analyst role, ideally in B2B, e-commerce, or life sciences.
  • Strong SQL skills; comfortable extracting and transforming data across traffic, orders, product, and customer datasets from multiple sources.
  • Experience with data warehousing platforms - Snowflake, AWS Redshift, or Google BigQuery.
  • Hands-on experience with analytics and BI tools (GA4, Tableau, Looker Studio, or Power BI).
  • Self-starter - proactively surfaces insights and drives projects independently without waiting to be directed.
  • Proven ability to move from raw data to a clear, evidence-backed business story.
  • Excellent communication skills - able to present complex findings simply to non-technical audiences.
  • Python or R for advanced analysis is a plus, not a requirement.

Nice to Have

  • Background in life sciences, academic research, or a science-adjacent industry.
  • Experience with e-commerce analytics and product performance analysis (e.g. product-level conversion, basket data, order trends).
  • Familiarity with CRM data (e.g. Salesforce or HubSpot) and multi-touch attribution modelling.
  • Experience analysing performance across international markets.

What We Offer

  • Competitive salary and performance bonus.
  • High-ownership role with direct visibility to leadership.

title: Online Data Analyst Odia
tagsAndSkills: Data Analysis,search engines,Odia,Online Data Analyst,online maps,online research,Analysis,Data
jobDescription:
Are you a detail-oriented individual with a passion for research and a good understanding of national and local geography? This freelance opportunity allows you to work at your own pace and from the comfort of your own home.

A Day in the Life of an Online Data Analyst:

  • In this role, you will be working on a project aimed at enhancing the content and quality of digital maps that are used by millions of people worldwide
  • Completing research and evaluation tasks in a web-based environment such as verifying and comparing data, and determining the relevance and accuracy of information.

Join us today and be part of a dynamic and innovative team that is making a difference in the world!

Qualification Path

No previous professional experience is required to apply to this role, however, working on this project will require you to pass the basic requirements and go through a standard assessment process. This is a part-time long-term project and your work will be subject to our standard quality assurance checks during the term of this agreement.

Basic Requirements

  • Full Professional Proficiency in Odia & English language
  • Being a resident in India for the last 2 consecutive years and having familiarity with current and historical business, media, sport, news, social media, and cultural affairs in India.
  • Ability to follow guidelines and conduct online research using search engines, online maps, and website information
  • Flexibility to work across a diverse set of task types, including maps, news, audio tasks, and relevance
  • Daily access to a broadband internet connection, computer, and relevant software

ASSESSMENT

In order to be hired into the program, youll take an open book qualification exam that will determine your suitability for the position and complete ID verification. Our team will provide you with guidelines and learning materials before your qualification exam. You will be required to complete the exam in a specific timeframe but at your convenience.
